title: calendula suffruticosa subsp. marginata
intro: Calendula suffruticosa subsp. marginata is a plant species within the marigold family, commonly known for its vibrant yellow and orange flowers. The plant possesses medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. Calendula suffruticosa subsp. marginata offers various health benefits, including wound healing, skin protection, and relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for topical and internal use, as well as infused oil for skin and wound care.
